relations.note: Masthead gradient is one member of the approved gradient set with specific usage.
Direction rule applies to the approved gradients in masthead/banner contexts.

quotes: Gradient Specifications (approved set — never invent gradients)
Used as backgrounds, in combination with the wave graphic, and with the LISRAYA logo mark. Approved values only.

rules.intent: Preserve brand gradient integrity by prohibiting non-approved gradients.
rules.rule_text: Only the approved gradient set may be used; never invent gradients. Approved gradients include Brand Blue → Dark Navy (#00529b → #011E45), Sky Blue → Deep Blue (#358CCB → #003D74), Sunshine → 75% Gold (#faa31b → Gold @75%), Golden Sand → White → Light Blue (#FEF1C8 → #ffffff → #E6F0F9), Golden Sand → 75% Gold → Sunshine, and the Masthead gradient Sunshine → light gold (#faa31b → ≈#ffe05c). Gradients are used as backgrounds, in combination with the wave graphic, and with the LISRAYA logo mark, using approved values only.

quotes: Masthead gradient — the gradient to use with the logo mark for contrast; mark sits at the lightest end
Masthead gradient — the gradient to use with the logo mark for contrast; mark sits at the lightest end

rules.intent: Ensure correct masthead gradient application and logo contrast.
rules.rule_text: The masthead gradient (masthead.gradient = Sunshine → light gold, #faa31b → ≈#ffe05c) is the gradient to use with the logo mark for contrast, and the LISRAYA logo mark sits at the lightest end of the gradient.

quotes: Gradients run horizontally in masthead/banner applications (dark/saturated → light, left → right as shown).

rules.intent: Maintain consistent gradient orientation in mastheads and banners.
rules.rule_text: In masthead/banner applications, gradients run horizontally from dark/saturated to light (left → right as shown).
